text:
Starbites Switch 2 Version Delayed

The NIS America and Ikinagames RPG Starbites is delayed on the Switch 2, but all other versions will appear as planned.

The post Starbites Switch 2 Version Delayed appeared first on Siliconera.

author: Siliconera
text:
Time Crisis PS4 and PS5 Version Gets Gyro Aim

The PS1 Time Crisis game is headed to the PS4 and PS5 via the PlayStation Plus Classic program and now has a Gyro Aim feature.

The post Time Crisis PS4 and PS5 Version Gets Gyro Aim appeared first on Siliconera.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Pokemon Keychains Are Replicas of Plamo Model Kits

The next Pokemon keychains are replicas of the Plamo Quick model kits of Kanto starters, Eevee, Pikachu, and Mew.

The post New Pokemon Keychains Are Replicas of Plamo Model Kits appeared first on Siliconera.

They'll come out in early 2027.

text:
Interview: Learning More About the Vampire Farming Sim Moonlight Peaks

Little Chicken CEO Yannis Bolman talked about Moonlight Peaks' development and creating the farming life sim with vampires and werewolves.

The post Interview: Learning More About the Vampire Farming Sim Moonlight Peaks appeared first on Siliconera.

author: Siliconera
text:
More Virtual Boy Games Now Available on Switch and Switch 2

5 more Virtual Boy games are available via the Switch and Switch 2 NSO + Expansion Pack app worldwide, and Japan gets an extra title.

The post More Virtual Boy Games Now Available on Switch and Switch 2 appeared first on Siliconera.

author: Siliconera
text:
Cover Shutting Down Hololive Holoearth Metaverse

The Holoearth Hololive metaverse project tied to Cover Vtubers will shut down in June, and premium currency sales ended.

The post Cover Shutting Down Hololive Holoearth Metaverse appeared first on Siliconera.
